description: CompositionDark steel capris made of a cotton and lycra mix fabric, with a drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the lengthFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironSoft on the inside, sporty on the outside, you and these pants have a lot in common. Made of a cotton-lycra fabric and engineered with the patented Classic 3-Stripes on the side, this is perfect when you want that casual sporty look. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these cotton-lycra capris allow easy movement and do not lose shape even after years. While the soft fabric keeps you cool, the drawcord lets you customise the Fit on your waist. Pair it with an adidas t-shirt from the wide range available at myntra and achieve maximum performance on and off the field.Model's statistics1. The model wears trousers, length of 39"2. Height-5.7", Waist-25", Hips-35"
